overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a grand Gothic-style circular council chamber with deep blue walls, gold filigree, and towering arched windows. The camera remains completely stationary throughout, capturing several robed figures seated around an ornate circular table, with a single character walking through the foreground midway through the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic circular council chamber with central meeting table

events.description: a robed figure enters from the left foreground and walks across the room
the walking figure exits the frame to the right, returning to static scene

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the council chamber from a fixed vantage point

notable_agents.action: walking across the foreground from left to right between 30-35 seconds

entered.detail: large ornate circular table with intricate carvings and glowing center
tall pointed arch windows with stained glass and stone tracery
elaborate ceiling-mounted chandelier with multiple light sources
framed portraits hanging on the blue wall
gold wall-mounted light fixtures between the windows

segments.scene_description: The video shows a static view of an ornate Gothic council chamber with blue walls and gold accents. Several figures in dark robes sit around a large circular wooden table. At approximately 30 seconds, a figure walks through the foreground from left to right, temporarily passing through the scene before exiting, while the seated figures remain stationary throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, wide-angle perspective of a grand Gothic council chamber where a moment of stillness is briefly interrupted by a passing figure. It begins with a view of the ornate room, characterized by deep blue walls, gold filigree, and several figures in dark robes seated motionless around a large circular wooden table. As the scene persists in its quiet atmosphere, a single figure enters from the left and walks steadily across the foreground. The camera remains fixed as this individual traverses the space from left to right, temporarily obscuring the view of the chamber before exiting the frame. The shot finally returns to its initial state of solemnity, leaving the seated figures in their silent, stationary vigil.
